primary.name: elaboration_rate
primary.description: Fraction of instances whose generated Lean file elaborates successfully.

primary.name: semantic_faithfulness_mean
primary.description: Instance-average of (num_faithful / num_obligations) over instances that produced at least one obligation.

primary.name: critical_unit_coverage
primary.description: Sum of critical units covered across instances divided by the sum of critical units.

primary.name: proof_utility
primary.description: Fraction of instances where at least one obligation was used in a proof attempt.
